description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Deploy OCIO Homepage that runs on push to main branch under docs/site/** and allows manual dispatch. The workflow should have read permission to repository contents, write permission to GitHub Pages, and allow concurrent deployments without cancelling in-progress runs. It should have two jobs: build and deploy. The build job checks out the repository, installs Hugo CLI and Dart Sass, sets up GitHub Pages, installs Node.js dependencies, builds the site with Hugo, and uploads the artifact. The deploy job deploys the artifact to GitHub Pages.
